name: Cat
description: A cat. Inscrutable, unpredictable, and occasionally useful.

actions.name: Knock Something Over
actions.description: Triggers a minor chaos event in target zone; slight loyalty disruption.

name: Tiger
description: A tiger. Its presence is... motivating.

actions.name: Motivational Visit
actions.description: Sends tiger to 'visit' a disloyal agent; significant loyalty increase (fear-based).

name: Raven
description: A raven. Intelligent, loyal, and exceptionally discreet.

actions.name: Message Delivery
actions.description: Delivers an untraceable communication; used in certain plot chains.

name: Shark (in a tank)
description: A shark, in a tank, present at interrogations. Its contribution is atmospheric.

actions.name: Threatening Display
actions.description: Used in interrogation events; increases information extraction success.
